entries.closure_note: Production path wired: EnterAction::HostTool variant added to preset manifest; production path is schedule tick -> preset graph -> StateCompositeTask -> HostToolCallTask -> DaemonToolDispatchAdapter -> handler. AC1 met (one tool callable from a running schedule). W-01 resolved by fix commit aa0574cc.
entries.closure_evidence: commit aa0574cc fix(v1.42 P3): QC fix wave; qc3 targeted re-review (commit 615f1e93, verdict Approve) verified the wiring + new supervisor-level integration test passes

entries.closure_note: Hot-path tightened: value_contains_template() helper short-circuits payload build + handlebars rendering when args contain no {{ placeholders. Trade-off documented. W-02 resolved by fix commit aa0574cc.
entries.closure_evidence: commit aa0574cc fix(v1.42 P3): QC fix wave; qc3 targeted re-review (commit 615f1e93, verdict Approve) verified the hot-path tightening

entries.closure_note: FORBIDDEN test assertion strengthened: CapabilityError::Forbidden variant added; adapter preserves NexusApiError::Forbidden -> CapabilityError::Forbidden. Test now asserts the Forbidden variant directly. W-01 resolved by fix commit aa0574cc.

entries.closure_note: Completion-lock test added: seed_work_completion_locked() helper + new test verifies read-only schedule_status succeeds under completion-lock through the adapter path. W-02 resolved by fix commit aa0574cc.
